title: Conioselinum tenuisectum
taxonomy: Conioselinum tenuisectum belongs to the family Apiaceae and is classified as a species of flowering plant. It is a member of the genus Conioselinum, which consists of several species of plants native to Eastern Asia. The plant's classification is further detailed in the kingdom Plantae and the division Magnoliophyta.
